creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
I couldn't reproduce the problem on my end on the first try; the only thing it complains about is not finding the WindowsSpyBlocker lists, which is fixed in a1aa173 [1].

I'll run more tests in a clean(er) environment. In the meantime, could you post the mangled local-void.zones file for me to have a look at?


[1] https://github.com/cyclaero/void-zones-tools/commit/a1aa1739da277e7913ff3fbc36bbaeb6a06c2159
